Year: This represents the specific year for which the tenure data is being represented.
Average_Tenure_in_Years: This is the average tenure of MediConn Solutions' customer service representatives for the given year. It is measured in years.
Change_from_Previous_Year: This represents the change in average tenure from the previous year. Positive values indicate an increase, while negative values indicate a decrease.
Longest_Tenure_in_Years: This is the tenure of the longest-serving customer service representative at MediConn Solutions for the given year. It is measured in years.
